mapper.insert:
INSERT /* @SQLID=SUB0602-02_1#Sql001 */ INTO TB_MED_INFORMATION( INFO_ID , INFO_DETAIL , IMPORTANT_FLG , DISPLAY_ORDER , DELETE_FLG , DISPLAY_PERIOD_FROM , DISPLAY_PERIOD_TO , CREATE_TIME , CREATE_USER , UPDATE_TIME , UPDATE_USER ) VALUES ( (SELECT DECODE(MAX(INFO_ID), null , 0, MAX(INFO_ID)) FROM TB_MED_INFORMATION) +1 , #{req.notificationContent} , #{req.importantNotification} , 0 , #{req.nonDisplay}
, TO_DATE(#{req.displayPeriodFrom}, 'YYYY/MM/DD')
, IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE
, TO_DATE(#{req.displayPeriodTo}, 'YYYY/MM/DD') + INTERVAL '23:59:59' HOUR TO SECOND
, TO_DATE('9999/12/31', 'YYYY/MM/DD')
, IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE , #{req.createUser} , IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE , #{req.updateUser} )
